#comment: THE FOLLOWING ARE CMOR SETTINGS SPECIFIED FOR OBS4MIPS THAT SHOULD NOT BE EDITED BY THE USER
#comment2: THE INFORMATION BELOW CAN BE EDITED BY THE USER
comment: HadCRUT5 is a gridded dataset of global historical surface temperature anomalies relative to a 1961-1990 reference period, available from January 1850 onwards on a 5-degree grid. It is a blend of CRUTEM5 land surface air temperature and HadSST4 sea-surface temperature datasets, presented as an ensemble of 200 realisations sampling observational uncertainty. Both infilled (analysis) and non-infilled versions are available.
license: Data in this file is available under the Open Government Licence v3 (http://www.nationalarchives.gov.uk/doc/open-government-licence/version/3/).
references: Morice, C. P., Kennedy, J. J., Rayner, N. A., Winn, J. P., Hogan, E., Killick, R. E., et al. (2021). An updated assessment of near-surface temperature change from 1850: the HadCRUT5 data set. Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres, 126, e2019JD032361. https://doi.org/10.1029/2019JD032361
title: HadCRUT.5.1.0.0 prepared for obs4MIPs (ODS2.6)
